description: Regal Entertainment Group operates movie theaters and provides online services around cinema listings and ticketing. Its developer portal advertises Regal APIs for external developers, but the publicly accessible documentation is sparse and does not expose a machine-readable API specification.
summary: regmovies.com exposes a developer portal for a Regal HTTP API, with signup/subscription required to obtain API access; no public spec, GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI was found.
